scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @korus/backend & npm run dev --workspace @korus/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @korus/shared && npm run build --workspace @korus/backend && npm run build --workspace @korus/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @korus/backend && npm run lint --workspace @korus/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @korus/backend && npm run test --workspace @korus/frontend
